items.name_en: BV's elegant mini tote is here. This time it comes with a long strap for crossbody or shoulder wear. Every piece of leather on the bag is handcrafted and finished repeatedly. If you pursue the texture of handmade craftsmanship, you absolutely cannot miss this [Heart]. The large woven element makes it a great commuter item. The overall simple design is both chic and stylish, easy to match, and full of the brand's signature minimalist style. Lightweight and versatile, it's a favorite for many. This one is a safe bet.
items.name_cn:

items.name_en: BV's new Andiamo is here!!️ Featuring the classic Intrecciato woven technique, this soft bag features metal rope knots crafted with jewelry-grade micro-cast aluminum🪢. Decorative beads are made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you swing between elegance and fun💃, hard to predict. Classic and versatile, it looks very classy, and the bag has a large capacity, making it very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, adjustable shoulder strap, original calf leather feels soft and delicate. Designed with a unisex style that breaks gender boundaries, offering a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, blending elegance and casual style, perfectly interprets the essence of 'fashionable old money style'.

items.name_en: BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ Classic Intrecciato woven craftsmanship creates a soft bag, metal knots are micro-cast aluminum using jewelry craftsmanship 🪢, decorative beads are metal and hand-polished oak, making you switch between elegance and fun 💃, unpredictable. Classic and versatile, looks classy, and the bag has a large capacity, very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying methods, adjustable strap, original sheepskin feels soft and delicate, unisex style, breaking gender boundaries, bringing a more practical and durable experience, combining elegance and casual style, the Andiamo perfectly interprets the look of "fashion old money style".

BV's new Andiamo is in stock!!️ Featuring the classic Intrecciato woven technique for a soft body, the metal knot is crafted using jewelry-grade micro-cast aluminum🪢, and the decorative beads are made of metal and hand-polished oak, making you swing between elegance and fun💃, hard to predict. Classic and versatile, it looks very classy, and the bag has a large capacity, making it very convenient for daily commuting! Multiple carrying styles, adjustable shoulder strap, original calf leather feels soft and delicate. Designed with a unisex style that breaks gender boundaries, offering a more practical and durable experience. The Andiamo, combining elegance and casual style, perfectly embodies the look of 'fashion old money'.
Style No.: 743568+Wood Hardware
Color: Space Blue with Silver Buckle
Size: 25*22*10.5cm
